steps.title: Rewrite the radical
steps.content:
A square root is the same as raising to the power $\frac{1}{2}$.
$$
\sqrt{x^{157}}=(x^{157})^{1/2}
$$

steps.title: Multiply the exponents
steps.content: Use the power-of-a-power rule. $$ (x^{157})^{1/2}=x^{157\cdot\frac{1}{2}}=x^{\frac{157}{2}} $$ The answer is B.
